## Task Description

A clear and concise description of the task.

## What problem does this task solve?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

## Knowledge Module References

> **选择相关的知识模块**，帮助开发者快速定位相关文档：
- `knowledge/core-api.md` - 任务CRUD、模板管理、用户认证
- `knowledge/database.md` - 数据模型、GORM配置
- `knowledge/scheduler.md` - 优先级队列、限流调度
- `knowledge/executor.md` - K8s Pod 生命周期管理
- `knowledge/provider.md` - Agent 运行时配置
- `knowledge/capability.md` - 能力注册与管理
- `knowledge/intervention.md` - 人工干预机制
- `knowledge/monitoring.md` - 日志采集与监控告警

## Execution Plan

> **执行计划链接**（开发完成后填写）：- `docs/current/plans/issue-{N}-execution.md`
- `docs/current/issues/issue-{N}-summary.md`
